sn21.9:1.0.1: At Sāvatthī.sn.ii.282Then the Venerable Tissa, the Blessed One's paternal cousin,approached the Blessed One, paid homage to him, and sat down to one side—miserable, sorrowful, with tears streaming down. Then the Blessed One said to him:
sn21.9:1.0.2: This is what the Blessed One said. Having said this, the Fortunate One, the Teacher, further said this:
